section:
OrderManagerV5 Class Reference OrderManagerV5
The OrderManagerV5 class is responsible for managing orders and their execution. It implements the IOrderHandler interface and inherits from the NamedThread class.
#include <OrderManagerV5.hpp>
Inheritance diagram for OrderManagerV5:
Public Member Functions
OrderManagerV5 (int core, string owner)
Constructs an OrderManagerV5 object.
virtual ~OrderManagerV5 ()
Destroys the OrderManagerV5 object.
void Stop ()
Stops the order manager.
void LoadTemplate (const KTN::Order &ord)
Loads a template order.
string NewId (const string &prefix)
Generates a new order ID with the given prefix.
KTN::OrderPod GetOrder (uint64_t reqid)
Gets the order with the specified request ID.
bool Exists (uint64_t reqid)
Checks if an order with the specified request ID exists.
void Clear ()
Clears all orders.
void ClearDeadOrders ()
Clears all dead orders.
int Count ()
Gets the count of orders.
void Print ()
Prints the orders.
void UpdateMetaParams (const algometa &meta, bool certnr)
Updates the meta parameters with the given algorithm metadata.
void EnableOrderReporter (bool value)
Enables or disables the order reporter.
void ProcessSpreadLegs (bool value)
Sets whether to process spread legs.

Handles a banked order.

Handles a new sent order.

Handles a modified sent order.

Handles a canceled sent order.

Handles a fast sent order.

Handles an order book sent order.

Updates an order with the specified request ID.

Handles a minimum order acknowledgment.
void minOrderCancel (KTN::OrderPod &ord)
Handles a minimum order cancellation.
void minOrderModify (KTN::OrderPod &ord)
Handles a minimum order modification.
void UpdateExecution (uint64_t reqid, uint64_t exchordid, KOrderStatus::Enum status, KOrderState::Enum state, KOrderFillType::Enum filltype, int64_t lastpx, uint32_t lastqty, uint32_t lvs, uint64_t timestamp, string execid)
Updates the execution of an order with the specified request ID.
void UpdateSpreadLegExecution (uint64_t exchordid, KOrderSide::Enum side, int32_t secid, int64_t lastpx, uint32_t lastqty, uint64_t timestamp, string execid)
Updates the execution of a spread leg order with the specified CME ID.

Handles the execution of a minimum order.
void minOrderExecSpreadLeg (KTN::OrderPod &ord)
Handles the execution of a minimum order spread leg.
void minOrderReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const string &text)
Handles the rejection of a minimum order.
void minOrderCancelReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const string &text)
Handles the rejection of a minimum order cancellation.
void minOrderCancelReplaceReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const string &text)
Handles the rejection of a minimum order cancel/replace.
virtual void ProcessOrderID (uint64_t ordid)
Process the order ID.
virtual void ProcessOrder (OrderPod &ord)
Process the order.
virtual void ProcessFill (OrderPod &ord)
Process the fill.
virtual void ProcessSentOrder (OrderPod &ord)
Process the sent order.
virtual void ProcessRejectedOrder (OrderPod &ord, const string &text)
Process the rejected order.
virtual void RegisterOrderTemplate (Order &ord)

bool GetByExchId (KTN::OrderPod &ord, uint64_t exchordid)

vector< KTN::OrderPod > GetWorking ()

bool GetBySecIdSideStrat (KTN::OrderPod &ord, int32_t secid, const KOrderSide::Enum side, int stratid)
void GetByStratId (vector< KTN::OrderPod > &ords, int stratid)
void GetByAlgoTrigger (vector< KTN::OrderPod > &ords, const KOrderAlgoTrigger::Enum trig)
void GetByAlgoTriggerSecId (vector< KTN::OrderPod > &ords, const KOrderAlgoTrigger::Enum trig, int32_t secid)
void GetByAlgoTriggerPrice (vector< KTN::OrderPod > &ords, const KOrderAlgoTrigger::Enum trig, int32_t secid, int32_t price)
bool GetAtPrice (vector< KTN::OrderPod > &orders, int32_t secid, KOrderSide::Enum side, int32_t price, KOrderAlgoTrigger::Enum trig)
int GetSideExposure (int32_t secid, KOrderSide::Enum side, KOrderAlgoTrigger::Enum trig)
bool HasInflight (const string &tag)
bool HasInflight ()
void ClearInflight ()
Public Member Functions inherited from KTN::ORD::IOrderHandlerPublic Member Functions inherited from NamedThread
NamedThread ()
Default constructor.
virtual ~NamedThread ()
Destructor.
void CreateAndRun (string name, int core)
Creates and runs the named thread on the specified core.
void Join ()
Joins the named thread.
Detailed Description
The OrderManagerV5 class is responsible for managing orders and their execution. It implements the IOrderHandler interface and inherits from the NamedThread class.
Constructor & Destructor Documentation
OrderManagerV5() OrderManagerV5OrderManagerV5 OrderManagerV5OrderManagerV5
OrderManagerV5::OrderManagerV5 (int core, string owner)
Constructs an OrderManagerV5 object.
Parameters
core
The core number.
owner
The owner of the order manager.
~OrderManagerV5() ~OrderManagerV5OrderManagerV5 OrderManagerV5~OrderManagerV5
OrderManagerV5::~OrderManagerV5 ( )[virtual]
Destroys the OrderManagerV5 object.

RegisterOrderTemplate() RegisterOrderTemplateOrderManagerV5 OrderManagerV5RegisterOrderTemplate
void OrderManagerV5::RegisterOrderTemplate (Order & ord)[virtual]
This function is new in V5 to handle OrderPod conversion. Going forward we will only use the large format order for reporting back to database/monitoring systems that are not critical path
Implements KTN::ORD::IOrderHandler.

UpdateExecution() UpdateExecutionOrderManagerV5 OrderManagerV5UpdateExecution
void OrderManagerV5::UpdateExecution (uint64_t reqid, uint64_t exchordid, KOrderStatus::Enum status, KOrderState::Enum state, KOrderFillType::Enum filltype, int64_t lastpx, uint32_t lastqty, uint32_t lvs, uint64_t timestamp, string execid)
Updates the execution of an order with the specified request ID.
Parameters
reqid
The request ID of the order.
exchordid
The CME ID of the order.
status
The status of the order.
state
The state of the order.
filltype
The fill type of the order.
lastpx
The last price of the order.
lastqty
The last quantity of the order.
lvs
The leaves quantity of the order.
timestamp
The timestamp of the execution update.
execid
The execution ID of the order.
References CustomHFTMap::get(), and ProcessFill().

Updates the execution of a spread leg order with the specified CME ID.

secid

lastpx
